'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is a Gaiad character mentioned in chapter(s) 25 and 26 and 31 and 33 and 39 and 41 and 43 and 44 and 46 and 47 and 48 and 50 and 52 and 53 and 54 and 55 and 58 and 59.

[[Category:Misgenerated Gaiad characters]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Newest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
